columns.description: The unique key for each order.
columns.name: order_id

columns.description: Part of the composite FK to dim_customer_segment.
columns.name: customer_id

columns.description: Part of the composite FK to dim_customer_segment.
columns.name: segment_code

columns.description: The date the order was placed.
columns.name: ordered_at

columns.description: The total order amount in USD including tax.
columns.name: order_total

compiled_code:
with

orders as (

    select * from shaman.jf_staging.stg_orders

),

segments as (

    select * from shaman.jf_analytics.dim_customer_segment

),

joined as (

    select
        orders.order_id,
        orders.customer_id,
        segments.segment_code,
        orders.ordered_at,
        orders.order_total

    from orders
    inner join segments using (customer_id)

)

select * from joined
description: Fact table joining orders to their customer segment at time of order. One row per order.
label: fct_customer_segment_orders
name: fct_customer_segment_orders
raw_code:
with

orders as (

    select * from {{ ref('stg_orders') }}

),

segments as (

    select * from {{ ref('dim_customer_segment') }}

),

joined as (

    select
        orders.order_id,
        orders.customer_id,
        segments.segment_code,
        orders.ordered_at,
        orders.order_total

    from orders
    inner join segments using (customer_id)

)

select * from joined
